productDisplayName: Peter England Men Elite Blue Tie
description: Dressing the elite for years, peter england has crafted some of the classiest ties from the finest quality microfibre, individually handmade by expert craftsmen weavers in a range of beautiful colours and designs that effortlessly lift your level of sophistication. Wear it over a well-fitting dress shirt in a muted shade and crisp formals. Length: 147 cm Made of microfibre for luxurious feel and light sheenHas a vertical design in blue and whiteLoop with brand badge on the innerTie careDry clean only
